source.description:
Automation activities for Workday using Workday Web Services. These activities allow you to execute operations on Workday. 

PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS VERSION OF 2.0.0 PACKAGE CAN ONLY BE USED IN MODERN STUDIO PROJECTS WITH VERSIONS EQUAL OR HIGHER TO 22.4. IT WILL BREAK EXISTING WORKFLOWS. 

Please reach out to support if you need assistance with migration existing flows to Studio windows projects.
